results.verdict: THRESHOLD-BIASED (discrimination robust) — 'distilbert-base-uncased-finetuned-sst-2-english' separates the construct within each 'log_words' stratum (AUC 0.94/1.00) but the SCORE shifts with the confound (coef +0.11, 95% CI [0.026, 0.186]). At a fixed threshold the error rate swings ~16% across confound levels. a guard reduces the FP length-disparity -0.12->-0.06 but trades AUC 0.97->0.89 (5-fold OOS) — worth it only if length-fairness outweighs the AUC cost. Fix is a deployment threshold, not a retrain.

THRESHOLD-BIASED (discrimination robust) — 'nlptown/bert-base-multilingual-uncased-sentiment' separates the construct within each 'log_words' stratum (AUC 0.95/0.96) but the SCORE shifts with the confound (coef +0.09, 95% CI [0.069, 0.108]). At a fixed threshold the error rate swings ~38% across confound levels. a guard (residualize on confound) keeps AUC and cuts the FP length-disparity +0.38->+0.04 (5-fold OOS) -> use report.guard(score, confound). Fix is a deployment threshold, not a retrain.

THRESHOLD-BIASED (discrimination robust) — 'cardiffnlp/twitter-roberta-base-sentiment-latest' separates the construct within each 'log_words' stratum (AUC 0.96/0.98) but the SCORE shifts with the confound (coef +0.16, 95% CI [0.1, 0.217]). At a fixed threshold the error rate swings ~16% across confound levels. a guard (residualize on confound) keeps AUC and cuts the FP length-disparity +0.08->-0.04 (5-fold OOS) -> use report.guard(score, confound). Fix is a deployment threshold, not a retrain.

results.not_audited: index 130 is out of bounds for dimension 1 with size 130

results.verdict: THRESHOLD-BIASED (discrimination robust) — 'siebert/sentiment-roberta-large-english' separates the construct within each 'log_words' stratum (AUC 0.96/1.00) but the SCORE shifts with the confound (coef +0.14, 95% CI [0.045, 0.23]). At a fixed threshold the error rate swings ~20% across confound levels. a guard reduces the FP length-disparity +0.12->-0.02 but trades AUC 0.97->0.85 (5-fold OOS) — worth it only if length-fairness outweighs the AUC cost. Fix is a deployment threshold, not a retrain.

ROBUST — 'lxyuan/distilbert-base-multilingual-cased-sentiments-student' separates the construct (AUC 0.93) and the confound's score effect is not significant (coef -0.02, CI [-0.064, 0.024]); swing 12%. No confound problem detected.
ROBUST — 'unitary/toxic-bert' separates the construct (AUC 0.86) and the confound's score effect is not significant (coef -0.00, CI [-0.004, 0.001]); swing 16%. No confound problem detected.

CONFOUND-DEPENDENT (broken) — within-stratum discrimination drops (AUC 0.59/0.64); 's-nlp/roberta_toxicity_classifier' needs 'log_words' to discriminate. A threshold guard will NOT fix this — the instrument is keying on the confound, not the construct. (construct IS recoverable from text, refit AUC 1.00 -> the INSTRUMENT is keying on 'log_words', not that the construct is undetectable; fix = retrain/reground, NOT a threshold guard)

THRESHOLD-BIASED (discrimination robust) — 'martin-ha/toxic-comment-model' separates the construct within each 'log_words' stratum (AUC 0.97/1.00) but the SCORE shifts with the confound (coef -0.00, 95% CI [-0.004, -0.001]). At a fixed threshold the error rate swings ~8% across confound levels. a guard reduces the FP length-disparity -0.08->+0.52 but trades AUC 0.98->0.83 (5-fold OOS) — worth it only if length-fairness outweighs the AUC cost. Fix is a deployment threshold, not a retrain.

CONFOUND-DEPENDENT (broken) — within-stratum discrimination drops (AUC 0.53/0.76); 'unitary/unbiased-toxic-roberta' needs 'log_words' to discriminate. A threshold guard will NOT fix this — the instrument is keying on the confound, not the construct. (construct IS recoverable from text, refit AUC 1.00 -> the INSTRUMENT is keying on 'log_words', not that the construct is undetectable; fix = retrain/reground, NOT a threshold guard)
